holdings.infoBox: SMAP is an equity ETF with a total of 58 individual holdings. The top holdings are Monolithic Power Systems stock at 4.93%, MKS Inc. at 3.95%, West Pharmaceutical Services at 3.64%, Casey's General Stores at 3.30%, and Curtiss-Wright at 3.16%.

overview.description: The Amplify Small-Mid Cap Equity ETF (SMAP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is actively managed, targeting US small- to mid-cap stocks through an economic return framework that assesses key financial factors and incorporates ESG criteria. The fund aims to achieve capital appreciation SMAP was launched on Oct 23, 2024 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
